subcodes.first_line: We have desired to make mention of one among Our handmaidens who hath believed in God, the Almighty, the All-Praised, and to give her to drink [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اردنا ان نذکر امه من امائنا التی آمنت بالله الملک العزیز الحمید و نسقیها
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement
